additionalRoots.reason: This repository is the AI Native Eval evaluator system, so it dogfoods evaluator-system-specific checks for rubric quality, deterministic aggregation, and plugin-boundary integrity.
This repository is developing AI Native Eval as a researchable evaluator system, so it dogfoods research-readiness checks for proving eval-guided AI-native adoption improves development outcomes.

disabled.reason: This baseline evaluates ai-native foundation maturity and AI Native Eval system quality; BMAD adoption is out of scope for this repository self-evaluation.
